step_rationale: FGF23 co-receptor; systemic cardioprotective axis off-pathway.
mechanism: Klotho modulates FGF23-driven myocardial processes and serves as a diagnostic biomarker for myocardial infarction via systemic mineral-metabolism pathways.

references.title: Fibroblast Growth Factor 23 as a Prognostic Biomarker in Post-Myocardial Infarction Outcomes: Influence of Renal Function and Its Modulation by Klotho.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association

references.title: Diagnostic potential of increased Klotho and FGF23 protein concentrations after myocardial infarction in patients with acute coronary syndrome.
